overall.description: A cinematic train ride through a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The video shows the interior of an automated train with digital advertisements as it travels along elevated tracks, stops at a station platform, and continues through a dense urban landscape with towering skyscrapers and neon billboards. This is game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: automated train interior traveling through elevated urban transit corridor

events.description: train approaches station infrastructure, exterior view transitions from open cityscape to enclosed station approach

agents.ego_description: seated passenger observing the futuristic cityscape through the train windows as the vehicle moves along elevated tracks

entered.detail: rows of gray padded seats with blue accents lining the interior of the automated train car
illuminated digital displays mounted on the ceiling showing advertisements including 'FIXER' text and brand logos
linear fluorescent lighting panels running along the ceiling of the train car
curved railway tracks visible through the front window extending into the distance
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and neon signage visible through the side windows

segments.scene_description: The video opens inside an automated train traveling through a cyberpunk city during golden hour. The interior features rows of seats and digital advertisement screens while the train moves along elevated tracks, passing concrete pillars and approaching a station structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train station platform with commercial signage and amenities

events.description: train decelerates as it pulls alongside the station platform
train comes to a complete stop at the station platform

agents.ego_description: passenger waiting inside the now stationary train, observing the empty station platform through the side windows

entered.detail: concrete platform with green painted walls and scattered debris visible alongside the train
large red and white corporate advertisement banner reading 'CIRRUS' mounted on the station wall
green illuminated sign with 'NCA' text and 'NIGHT CITY' visible on the station structure
yellow and black automated vending unit with glowing display screen on the platform
metal and concrete seating arrangements along the station wall

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at an elevated station platform, slowing to a stop. Through the windows, the platform reveals commercial signage including a prominent 'CIRRUS' advertisement, vending machines, and empty benches. The train remains stationary for several seconds before preparing to depart.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train traveling through dense commercial district with highway interchanges and waterfront views

events.description: train accelerates and departs from the station platform, resuming journey
view opens up to reveal expansive highway interchanges and towering commercial skyscrapers with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: passenger riding the train as it curves through the elevated transit system, passing massive skyscrapers and neon billboards in the distance

entered.detail: multi-level highway ramps and overpasses running parallel to the train tracks with vehicles visible below
massive cylindrical building with large digital billboard displaying 'TOO GOOD TO WASTE' and product imagery
body of water visible between buildings in the distance reflecting the golden hour sunlight
complex curved highway ramps and elevated roadways intersecting near the train tracks

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and continues its journey through the dense cyberpunk cityscape. The view opens to reveal massive highway interchanges, towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards, and glimpses of water in the distance. The train curves along elevated tracks as the golden hour light illuminates the futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the interior of a moving automated train into the expansive heart of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis during golden hour. It begins inside the carriage, gliding past concrete pillars and digital advertisement screens as the train approaches a station structure. As the train slows to a stop, the view shifts through the windows to reveal an elevated platform featuring vending machines and a prominent Cirrus advertisement. The scene then expands as the train departs the station, curving along elevated tracks to uncover a dense urban landscape of massive highway interchanges and towering skyscrapers. Finally, the perspective opens wide to reveal digital billboards and distant water, all bathed in the warm, golden light of the setting sun.
